jobs.descriptionSnippet: L3Harris is dedicated to recruiting and developing high-performing talent who are passionate about what they do. Our employees are unified in a shared dedication to our customers’ mission and quest for professional growth. jobs.title: Product Manager
jobs.descriptionSnippet: Bilingue FR/EN. The sky's the limit. A seat at the table, with the people who can actually move things, in a business that's already working. Now we're levelling up to what's next. If that landed, keep reading. Who we are It started with two founders, a basement, and a phone book. Two years of cold calls before there was even an office to make them from. The people running this floor today are the ones who did that work. They remember what it takes. jobs.title: Director, Product Management, Internet Services
jobs.descriptionSnippet: Xplore Inc. is Canada’s fibre, 5G and satellite broadband company for rural living. Xplore is committed to the relentless pursuit of an improved broadband experience for all Canadians. Xplore is building a world-class fibre optic and 5G wireless network to enable innovative broadband services for better every day rural living, for today and future generations. The Director, Product Development – Internet Services is accountable for defining and executing the company’s broadband product and netw…

jobs.title: Chef de Produits (Product Manager)
jobs.descriptionSnippet: Contexte de l'entreprise Opsun est un leader canadien dans la conception, l'ingénierie et la fabrication de structures de montage solaires en aluminium. Nous desservons l'ensemble de l'Amérique du Nord — Canada, États-Unis, Mexique et Caraïbes — avec un siège social à Québec et des installations de production à Cornwall (Ontario) et High Point (Caroline du Nord). jobs.title: Product Manager fiduciary services and Pricing Strategy
jobs.descriptionSnippet: A career as a Product Manager within the National Bank Trust team means playing a strategic role at the heart of defining and executing strategies related to fiduciary products and the sector’s pricing strategy. In this key role, you contribute to the development and evolution of high value-added solutions-specifically our offering in estates, trusts, and philanthropy-by guiding decisions related to innovation, pricing, distribution, and product lifecycle management.
